Click a point to select it. Click again to deselect. Click multiple points to combine them.
Patio Doors Ordered
$ Volume — Patio Door Deals
Volume = total Net Orders $ for deals that included the currently selected product (switches automatically with the Product toggle above). "Revenue Per Deal" divides $ volume by deal count — this dataset contains closed deals only, so a true close rate (closed ÷ appointments run) can't be calculated from it.
